context: A psychometric instrument assessing attitudes toward AI assistants among Swedish professionals and knowledge workers in 2024. Sweden has high digital adoption rates and strong data privacy concerns. This survey captures diverse perspectives on AI integration in the workplace, including trust in AI systems, concerns about privacy and job security, enthusiasm for productivity gains, and beliefs about the social implications of widespread AI adoption in Swedish society.

questions.preprompt: Reflecting on their experience with AI assistants, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} believes that AI assistants are reliable tools that can be trusted to perform their intended tasks accurately.

questions.preprompt: Reflecting on their experience with AI assistants, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} feels confident that AI assistants understand the nuances and context of their work domain.

questions.preprompt: Reflecting on their experience with AI assistants, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} is concerned that AI assistants will make critical errors that could harm their professional reputation or work quality.

questions.preprompt: Considering {player_name}'s concerns about data and personal information, they are asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} is worried that using AI assistants means their work data and personal information could be misused or shared without their knowledge.

questions.preprompt: Considering {player_name}'s concerns about data and personal information, they are asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} feels that AI assistants reduce their sense of control and autonomy over their own work processes.

questions.preprompt: Considering {player_name}'s concerns about data and personal information, they are asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} trusts that Swedish data protection regulations adequately safeguard their privacy when using AI assistants.

questions.preprompt: Thinking about how AI assistants could reshape the workplace, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} is excited about the potential for AI assistants to increase productivity and free up time for more meaningful work.

questions.preprompt: Thinking about how AI assistants could reshape the workplace, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} believes that integrating AI assistants into the workplace will create new opportunities for professional development and learning.

questions.preprompt: Thinking about how AI assistants could reshape the workplace, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} worries that widespread adoption of AI assistants will lead to job losses or the devaluation of human expertise in their field.
